1.brandVoiceRationale: Restrained voice, technical but accessible — BAINSA-shaped.
1.engagementRationale: Hook leans on the physical AI angle and lands fast.

2.engagementRationale: Statistic-led hook works; the 66% figure stops the scroll.

3.brandVoiceRationale: Voice is excellent here — leans into the human angle without losing the brand.

3.topicCoherenceRationale: Closes the chain on the worker perspective — complementary to the hook's industry framing.

4.brandVoiceRationale: Slightly informal but on-brand; the bullet body keeps it crisp.
4.engagementRationale: Hook implies action — "agents got their checkout counter" lands.
4.topicCoherenceRationale: Sets up the agents-in-production thread; needs the closer to ground it in the real world.

5.brandVoiceRationale: Voice is on-brand and clean — slightly more concrete than the hook.

5.topicCoherenceRationale: Ties the chain back to a deployed agent in industry — the practical follow-up to the Visa hook.
